title: Going Forward — Crypto/Web3 + Python self-curriculum, Jan 2022
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir's first explicit self-curriculum outside osu (Jan 30 2022): Crypto/Web3 research + Python + Finance study + local internship + reading + an "Egyptian Eye."
  • Web3 list is concrete, not aspirational: join + contribute to a DAO, create an ENS domain, mint an NFT. Pre-bear-market crypto-native checklist.
  • Sub-stack of life-admin tasks: FAFSA, scholarship renewals, "get events down."
  • The throwaway "What's my vision?? (Of success of good)" is the first vision-question in the corpus before 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future (the "ordinary life is not for us" note) two and a half years later.

Key quote

"What's my vision?? (Of success of good). Goals that align with that."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Anchors the corvallis crypto club / dao mergers arc that becomes the 2021 12 05 hey cameron yg thesis on drugs cofounder-recruiting moment three months prior — Yahir was already operating in crypto-Twitter / DAO orbit by early 2022.
  • "Egyptian Eye" surfaces here ungrounded — the egypt travel arc doesn't fully kick in until 2021 05 04 turkey egypt bucket list / 2023 09 06 egypt jordan itinerary. The eye motif may track to early identity-iconography tagged later.
  • Vision-asking is the earliest precursor to the asking the right question concept that Yahir explicitly named in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream.

Open questions

  • Did he ever join a specific DAO? Mint an NFT? Both are checkable artifacts.
  • The "local company internship" — ford family foundation / jcef adjacent, or actual tech?
